name: Democracy Without Borders
description: Global campaign for democratic world governance and stronger international institutions.

name: Rewilding Europe
description: Making Europe a wilder place by restoring natural processes and creating space for wildlife.

name: RadicalxChange Foundation
description: Building next-generation political economies through technology, design, and social innovation.

name: Kiss the Ground
description: Inspiring regeneration of the planet's soils through advocacy, media, and farmer training.

name: Purpose Foundation
description: Spreading steward-ownership as an alternative to traditional corporate ownership structures.

name: Transformative Play Initiative
description: Research group at Uppsala University studying how play and games can drive social transformation.

name: Sortition Foundation
description: Promoting the use of sortition — random selection — as a democratic tool for citizens' assemblies.

name: Gaia Foundation
description: Strengthening indigenous and local communities in defending their rights to land, seeds, and territories.

name: Metagovernance Project
description: Developing standards and tools for decentralised governance of online communities and DAOs.

name: Burning Man Project
description: Annual gathering and year-round community practising radical self-expression, gifting, and civic responsibility.

name: International Rights of Nature Tribunal
description: Independent tribunal that hears cases on behalf of ecosystems, species, and the rights of nature.

name: Doughnut Economics Action Lab
description: Turning Kate Raworth's doughnut economics framework into real-world practice for cities and communities.

name: Nordic Larp Community
description: International community advancing Nordic-style larp as an art form for social exploration and transformation.

name: Participatory Budgeting Project
description: Helping communities directly decide how to spend public money through democratic participatory processes.

name: ReFi DAO
description: Global community building regenerative finance infrastructure on web3 for climate and ecological action.

name: Indigenous Terra Madre
description: Network of indigenous food communities protecting biocultural diversity and traditional food systems worldwide.

name: Bellingcat
description: Open-source intelligence collective using digital tools and citizen journalism for accountability and truth.

name: Commons Network
description: European think tank and advocacy organisation promoting the commons as foundation for democratic society.

name: Wellbeing Economy Alliance
description: Coalition of organisations, movements, and individuals working towards a wellbeing economy.

name: Global Assembly
description: Pioneering a new form of global democratic participation, starting with the first Global Assembly on the Climate and Ecological Crisis.

name: terra0
description: Research and art project exploring how ecosystems could own and manage themselves using smart contracts.

name: School of System Change
description: Developing system change practitioners equipped to navigate complex social challenges.
